Influencer Outreach Scripts

[MAKE A COPY: FILE > MAKE A COPY]



DM outreach (General)

(To reach out to influencers via Instagram DM)

Hey (First Name), 



We’re @DropBottle a functional bottle company with a goal: to revolutionise the way people drink water and stay hydrated while leading the way for a socially-conscious business. 



We’re proud to support our charity partners @drop4drop with $1 from every Drop Bottle sold going towards bringing sustainable clean water solutions to the countries that need it the most. Plus thanks to our community we have offset over 3.5 million single use plastic bottles and counting. 



We love your account and we'd love you to join our community. We have spent the last year developing V.2 of our fruit infuser, durable borosilicate drink bottles that are as functional as they are fashionable.



If you’re interested, message us back and we can send you a care package. :)



Plus, we often organise shout out on @DetoxTips + @DetoxWater with a combined reach of 1.7 million followers, which can be beneficial to grow your following. 



(Name)







Sample Comments

“Hey, nice pic. We sent you a DM about @dropbottle, take a peek? ”



“We like your feed. You’d like our bottles. We sent you a DM about @dropbottle. Take a peek? ”



“You’re unlike anyone else, so we sent you a DM about joining the @dropbottle community. ”



“Nice feed. Our @dropbottle would look nice here, so we sent you a DM about joining the @dropbottle community. ”







Follow/Bump Up DM

Follow up message if already messaged re: sending them care package:



“Hey again 

We love your feed and we think you will love our bottles.  

So just bumping this up in your inbox 



Or



“Hey again 



I’m sending out our Drop Bottle care packages tomorrow morning  



We’d really love you to have one of our Gold Bottles. Just wanted to know if you’re still interested? If so, let me know your best postal address and phone number, and email address for the shipment ” 







Offer

Hey (First Name),



We have just released our new @dropbottle and we would love you to be amongst the first few people we’ve reached out to receive one of our bottles.



We’re kind of new to this, and you’re amongst the first few people we’ve reached out to about this offer.



We love your account and we'd love you to join our community. We have spent the last year developing V.2 of our fruit infuser, durable borosilicate drink bottles that are as functional as they are fashionable.



1 x feed post and 2-3 stories



We’d like to send you our Gold Drop Bottle in return for 1 X post in your feed and 2 - 3 Insta stories + a screenshot of the story analytics. Something we’ve noticed works well is an unboxing story, as well as showing how you use your bottle daily to keep hydrated. Such as bringing it to work or taking it with you to a yoga class. 



If you’re interested, let us know your best postal address along with your email address and phone number. If you have any thoughts, questions, or ideas, let us know them too.



Looking forward to hearing from you,

Love Drop Bottle x



(Add image of Gold Bottle in)







5. Confirmation Message

Thank you and Welcome to the Drop Bottle community. 



Your Bottle will be shipped first thing tomorrow. 



We look forward to working with you Please include the hashtag #dropbottle and tag @dropbottle when sharing your content.



Love Drop Bottle x









6. Email Acquisition 

(If you want to put it all in an email instead.)

Subject Line: Drop Bottle: Saying Hi.



Hey (First Name), 



We’re @DropBottle a functional bottle company with a goal: to revolutionise the way people drink water and stay hydrated while leading the way for a socially-conscious business. 



We’re proud to support our charity partners @drop4drop with $1 from every Drop Bottle sold going towards bringing sustainable clean water solutions to the countries that need it the most. Plus thanks to our community we have offset over over 3.5 million single use plastic bottles and counting. 



We love your account and we'd love you to join our community. We have spent the last year developing V.2 of our fruit infuser, durable borosilicate drink bottles that are as functional as they are fashionable.



Here are some people who have tried our product and love it:

@alphafoodie

@hellomissmay

@hedgehographer

And heaps more



You can find out more about Drop Bottle here, or suss us on social here.



Plus, we often organise shout out on @DetoxTips + @DetoxWater with a combined reach of 1.7 million followers, which can be beneficial to grow your following. 



If you’re interested, message us back and we can send you a care package. 



Love Drop Bottle
